title: Open field test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"16tnm","text":"The open field test was developed to test locomotor activity.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mice were put in a 56 ×56 cm open-field arenas in noise-canceling boxes, illuminated by dim red lights
The 20-minute-long session started recoding when mice were placed in the center of the arena.
Locomotor activity was analyzed by the LimeLight 5 (Actimetrics) software and reported as distance traveled.
creator: Chuyu Chen
